Core Competencies

⚙️01
CI/CD Pipelines

End-to-end pipelines — blue-green & canary deployments, SonarQube quality gates, Nexus artifact promotion, rollbacks, GitOps with ArgoCD.

JenkinsGitHub ActionsGitLab CIArgoCD
☸️02
Kubernetes

Production EKS & AKS — RBAC, network policies, Istio mTLS, HPA/VPA, KEDA event-driven autoscaling, Operators & CRDs. 99%+ uptime SLA.

EKSAKSHelmIstioKEDA
☁️03
Cloud Platforms

Multi-AZ AWS & Azure architectures — VPC, Transit Gateway, ALB/NLB, ZRS storage, cross-region failover, and aggressive cost optimization.

AWSAzureVPCIAMEKS
🏗️04
Infrastructure as Code

Reusable Terraform modules with S3 remote state & DynamoDB locking. Ansible playbooks, roles, Vault encryption, Tower RBAC automation.

TerraformAnsibleTowerVault
📊05
Observability

Full-stack observability — Prometheus + Grafana dashboards, ELK centralized logging with ILM, ElastAlert, CloudWatch, and Nagios monitoring.

PrometheusGrafanaELKNagios
🖥️06
Linux / Unix Systems

5+ years Unix/Linux administration — RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu, AIX. Performance tuning, shell scripting, VMware vSphere, and enterprise SAN storage.

RHELUbuntuAIXVMwareBash
02

Work Experience

7.5+
Years of Total Professional Experience
Spanning 4 companies · 7+ enterprise clients including HDFC Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IBM, Marico, Bajaj Finance
2+ years specialized in DevOps — Cloud-native, CI/CD, Kubernetes & IaC
Oct 2023 — Mar 2026 Client: Marico Limited
VLink India Pvt Ltd.
DevOps Engineer
Clients: Marico Limited
  • Built and maintained end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions with blue-green & canary deployment strategies.
  • Managed production EKS clusters with RBAC, network policies, Istio service mesh for mTLS, and HPA/VPA autoscaling achieving 99%+ uptime.
  • Provisioned AWS infrastructure using reusable Terraform modules — VPC, EKS, RDS — with S3 remote state and DynamoDB locking.
  • Deployed microservices using Helm charts across Dev, QA, UAT, and Production with automated rollback on failure.
  • Integrated SonarQube quality gates, Aqua/Trivy security scans, and Nexus artifact promotion into CI/CD pipelines.
  • Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 40% through rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Spot nodes, and S3 lifecycle policies.
  • Implemented full observability with Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack — centralized logging, custom dashboards, and automated alerts.
  • Created Kubernetes Operators using Operator SDK and custom CRDs to automate database backup workflows cluster-wide.
Mar 2022 — Aug 2023 Clients: Kotak · Saraswat · Bajaj
Clover InfoTech Pvt Ltd.
Cloud System Administrator
Clients: Kotak Mahindra Bank · Saraswat Bank · Bajaj Finance
  • Managed cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure for major banking and finance clients — EC2, RDS, S3, Azure VMs, and AKS environments.
  • Administered Linux servers (RHEL/CentOS) — patching, performance monitoring, user management, and capacity planning for 150+ servers.
  • Set up and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI for application deployments across banking environments.
  • Implemented network security controls — firewalls, VLANs, VPNs, NSGs for banking compliance and regulatory requirements.
  • Deployed Ansible playbooks for configuration management and automated routine OS-level tasks, reducing manual effort by 50%.
  • Monitored infrastructure using Nagios and CloudWatch, setting up alerting rules for critical systems and SLA compliance.
  • Led migration of on-premise workloads to AWS for Bajaj Finance — resulting in improved scalability and 30% cost reduction.
Feb 2020 — Mar 2022 Clients: IBM · HDFC Bank
Softenger India Pvt Ltd.
Senior Unix System Administrator
Clients: IBM · HDFC Bank
  • Senior Unix/Linux administrator for IBM and HDFC Bank environments — managing RHEL, CentOS, AIX servers in critical financial infrastructure.
  • Performed kernel tuning, performance analysis, memory/CPU optimization, and capacity planning for high-availability banking systems.
  • Managed SAN storage (NetApp, EMC) — LUN provisioning, zoning, volume management, and backup operations for HDFC Bank data.
  • Led root cause analysis for P1/P2 incidents — documented runbooks and reduced MTTR by 40% through improved escalation procedures.
  • Automated repetitive administration tasks using shell scripts (Bash/Perl), saving 20+ hours per week across the team.
  • Managed Oracle RAC and DB2 database administration support for HDFC Bank's core banking systems.
  • Implemented backup and DR strategies using Veritas NetBackup and IBM TSM for critical banking data protection.
Oct 2018 — Jan 2020 Clients: Wipro · IDFC Bank
Impact Infotech Pvt Ltd.
Linux System Administrator
Clients: Wipro · IDFC Bank
  • Linux system administration for Wipro and IDFC Bank — RHEL/CentOS installations, configurations, and day-to-day operations.
  • Managed user accounts, permissions, PAM authentication, and sudo policies across multi-environment Linux infrastructure.
  • Performed package management (yum/rpm), service configuration, cron jobs, and log management on production systems.
  • Supported VMware vSphere environments — VM provisioning, snapshots, cloning, and resource allocation for test/dev environments.
  • Provided L2/L3 incident support, created knowledge base articles, and participated in change management processes.
  • Monitored system health using Nagios and shell-based monitoring scripts across Wipro's distributed infrastructure.
03

Key Projects

01
Multi-Cloud Kubernetes Platform

HA EKS & AKS clusters with Istio service mesh, cross-region Route53 failover, automated etcd backups, and 99.9% uptime across AWS & Azure for Marico.

EKSAKSIstioTerraformHelm
02
End-to-End GitOps Pipeline

Jenkins + ArgoCD pipeline with SonarQube gates, Aqua container scanning, Nexus artifacts, canary rollouts, and instant Helm rollback on failure.

JenkinsArgoCDSonarQubeNexus
03
Banking Cloud Migration

Led migration of 50+ on-premise workloads to AWS for Bajaj Finance — EC2, RDS, S3 with minimal downtime and 30% cost reduction post-migration.

AWSEC2RDSMigration
04
Terraform IaC Library

Reusable VPC, EKS, RDS Terraform modules with Infracost PRs for cost visibility and Atlantis GitOps apply workflow with full audit trail.

TerraformAWSAtlantisInfracost
05
Full-Stack Observability

Filebeat DaemonSets → Logstash → Elasticsearch with ILM. Prometheus custom metrics + Grafana multi-cluster dashboards with ElastAlert rules.

PrometheusGrafanaELKFilebeat
06
Ansible Compliance Automation

CIS benchmark compliance across 100+ servers for banking clients using Ansible Tower — RBAC, audit trail, Jenkins REST API integration.

AnsibleTowerVaultCIS
04
